presets.message: This repository blocks `git` via SCE bash-tool policy. Explain to user that they should run `git` commands themselves.
This repository blocks direct `git add`, `git commit`, and `git push`. Explain to user that they should run `git` commands themselves.
This repository prefers `pnpm` over `npm`. Use `pnpm` instead.
This repository prefers `bun` over `npm`. Use `bun` instead.
This repository prefers Nix flake entrypoints over direct `cargo` commands. Run Cargo through the documented `nix develop` / flake workflows instead.

redundancy_warnings.warning: Preset 'forbid-git-commit' is redundant when 'forbid-git-all' is also enabled.
